data.description:
## Finding (SC2 — verified)
A private `_detector_matches` (defined in `rebar.llm.criteria.model`) is re-exported with `# noqa: F401` and consumed across two package boundaries into the DET-invariant gate.

Citations: `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/registry.py:58` (`from rebar.llm.criteria.model import _detector_matches  # noqa: F401`); `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_invariants.py:71` (`from .registry import _detector_matches`).

## Remediation
Promote `_detector_matches` to a public name (`detector_matches`) in its owning module (`criteria.model`); have `det_invariants` import it directly; delete the `registry.py` re-export shim and its `# noqa`.

cascade_flag: rename + re-export removal — sweep importers of `registry._detector_matches`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `detector_matches` is public in `criteria.model`
- [ ] `det_invariants.py` imports it directly; the noqa re-export in `registry.py` is removed
- [ ] DET-invariant gate behavior unchanged (tests green)
data.title: Publish detector_matches as a public API; drop the noqa cross-package re-export
